---
title: Quartier Goutte d'Or
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039590/gouttedor_eo9uzf.png
description: marché du Quartier Goutte d'Or
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2025/01/15
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039590/gouttedor_eo9uzf.png)
